I made it here accidentally as I was supposed to be at a nearby rooftop but they were full and couldn’t take us. With the clock ticking and almost running out of daylight, I decided to walk another couple of blocks towards the river waterfront to hopefully find a spot where we could see the sunset, and this is how I made it to Bushwick Inlet Park. People always say that things happen for a reason and I couldn’t agree more in this case. 

One of the things I like about NYC are the sunset city skyline views when you see it from the distance. Bushwick Inlet Park was perfect for this.

It was a quiet and well maintained park with a few people walking around. Really loved how quiet was. 

Can’t be happier I made it here.
